message:
fcp-graphql: test parity between with_shared_http_client and builder (br-jdhaw)

br-flywheel_connectors-jdhaw [LOW]

The shared-pool API added in a32fa513 (titled as upp69 but carrying
the jdhaw fix too) exposes two entry points that take an existing
Arc<HttpClient>: GraphqlClient::with_shared_http_client() and
GraphqlClientBuilder::with_http_client(). Both route to the same
new_with_client internal constructor, so both must produce
pool-sharing behavior.

Add a regression test that builds one client via each entry point,
both receiving the same Arc<HttpClient>, and asserts Arc::ptr_eq on
their internal `http` field. Prevents a future refactor from
silently stripping pool sharing from one entry point while leaving
the other.

The bead's intended remediation ((a) accept Arc<HttpClient> in the
builder, (b) doc-warn on GraphqlClient::new) landed in a32fa513;
this commit just cements the contract with a parity test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
